t.t-value: 'badge-red' if is_low else ('badge-orange' if is_warning else 'badge-green')
'DARURAT' if is_low else ('WARNING' if is_warning else 'AMAN')

div.t-att-data-status: 'emergency' if is_low else ('warning' if is_warning else 'safe')

i.t-att-style: 'color:' + ('#c5221f' if is_low else ('#e65100' if is_warning else '#1e7e34'))

div.t-att-style: 'width:' + str(min(100, (ing['qty_available'] / (ing['min_qty'] * 2 or 100)) * 100)) + '%; background-color:' + ('#c5221f' if is_low else ('#e65100' if is_warning else '#1e7e34'))

div.style: position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index:1000; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
